api: Front Core and Channel REST APIs
scope: Complete ledger for the public Front ReadMe Core and Channel OpenAPI registries captured without credentials. Six legacy-parity streams remain executable; all other REST operations are blocked ledger rows for follow-up stream, direct-read, binary, or reverse-ETL lanes.
